## Summary

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Changes packaging, signing, update, install, registry, telemetry, intake, or security posture

## Verification

- [ ] DCO sign-off present on every commit
- [ ] CI matrix passed or blocker recorded
- [ ] SBOM generated or blocker recorded
- [ ] License scan passed or blocker recorded
- [ ] Secret scan passed or blocker recorded
- [ ] Accessibility/performance checks passed or blocker recorded

## Security and Privacy

- [ ] No new outbound network destination
- [ ] No new telemetry event
- [ ] No secret, token, certificate, key, or credential material committed
- [ ] Security owner reviewed if any box above is unchecked
